narrative:
Precinct Windham Twp B (precinct in Portage County) has 651 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.5 percentage points.
